# Best Hosting Match — Web Hosting Comparison
URL: https://besthostingmatch.com

## What this site does
Independent web hosting comparison using 8-factor weighted editorial scoring.
Covers shared hosting, managed WordPress, cloud hosting, VPS, and dedicated servers.
Built to serve both beginners (plain-English explainers) and professionals (technical specs).
No paid placement. No first-person lab tests. Scores based on published specs, SLAs, and public data.

## Top Hosting Providers by Weighted Score (2026)
1. Kinsta       — 89/100 — Premium managed WordPress (Google Cloud C2)
2. Cloudways    — 89/100 — Managed multi-cloud (DigitalOcean, Vultr, AWS, GCP)
3. SiteGround   — 88/100 — Best support in shared hosting
4. Hostinger    — 87/100 — Best budget option, custom hPanel
5. DigitalOcean — 87/100 — Best developer ecosystem
6. Vultr        — 87/100 — 32 global locations, high-frequency NVMe

## Scoring Weights (v1.0 — locked)
- Performance (TTFB, Core Web Vitals, CDN): 25%
- Uptime / Reliability (SLA, redundancy): 20%
- Price / Value (entry + renewal pricing): 20%
- Support (24/7, channels, response time): 15%
- Security (SSL, backups, DDoS, WAF): 10%
- Ease of Use (control panel, one-click installs): 5%
- Scalability (upgrade paths, resource limits): 3%
- Developer Features (SSH, staging, git, WP-CLI): 2%

## Unique feature: True 3-Year Cost
We show the real cost of hosting — 12 months at the intro price plus 24 months at the renewal
price — not just the headline introductory rate. This exposes the renewal-price trap that most
comparison sites hide.

## Full machine-readable data
JSON endpoint: https://besthostingmatch.com/data/hosting-comparison-2026.json

## Editorial model
Scores are editorial — based on published specs, SLA documentation, and independent benchmark
reports. Not first-person lab tests. Full rubric: https://besthostingmatch.com/methodology

## Part of the Best Match network
- https://bestvpnmatch.com — VPN comparison
- https://bestvpsmatch.com — VPS comparison
